label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation in Jurisdiction of Incorporation)
rationale: Page-0 heading reads 'FOREIGN NONPROFIT CORPORATION' — per 2026-04-30-entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md, foreign-form name fields use entity.home_jurisdiction_name. Same convention as CORP_MBCA-19, NP_MNPCA-19A, LLC_MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: FIRST: If the real corporate name is not available in this state... the name it proposes to use in the State of Maine:
rationale: Proposed name in Maine when the foreign legal name is unavailable. Same canonical key used by CORP_MBCA-19 (which references domestication.maine_name in open_questions/rubric even though the BC template does not include a body widget for it; this nonprofit template does include the widget).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The corporation was originally incorporated in ___ (state or country)
rationale: State or country of original incorporation (foreign jurisdiction).

label_verbatim: and the original date of incorporation was ___
rationale: Date of original formation in the home jurisdiction.

label_verbatim: THIRD: All the statements required to be set forth in Articles of Incorporation (MBCA-6-1) are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit letter referencing the attached new-entity Articles of Incorporation. Template references 'MBCA-6-1' (the BC articles form), which is suspected to be an upstream template-text error — for a nonprofit domestication, the attached articles would conventionally be MNPCA-6-1 (nonprofit articles). Canonical key reused from CORP_MBCA-19.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The effective date of the articles of domestication and conversion (if other than the date of filing of the articles of domestication and conversion) is ___
rationale: Optional future effective date. If blank, filing date applies. Same shape as CORP_MBCA-19 / conversion.future_effective_date / merger.future_effective_date.

label_verbatim: DATED ___
*By ___ (signature of an officer or other duly authorized representative) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D per 2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md (matches CORP_MBCA-19, MBCA-11, MLLC-12, MBCA-19A, NP_MNPCA-19A). The *By signature line is decorative — wet-ink applied post-print.
